76192.subject: 📰 AI-curated Daily Crypto Digest - July 19
76192.body:
AI-Curated Daily Crypto Digest

Автор: Oleh Bezuhlyi


Автор: Oleh Bezuhlyi

    
    
    Прочитайте цю статтю на LinkedIn, щоб приєднатися до обговорення
Прочитати на LinkedIn
https://www.linkedin.com/comm/pulse/ai-curated-daily-crypto-digest-july-19-oleh-bezuhlyi-nmfdf?lipi=urn%3Ali%3Apage%3Aemail_email_series_follow_newsletter_02%3BeiAxlS2TS5WEmzgoBrPVtA%3D%3D&midToken=AQFTjFOONAfT2w&midSig=04Rx5LuU3ZQck1&trk=eml-email_series_follow_newsletter_02-null-0-read_more_banner_cta_&trkEmail=eml-email_series_follow_newsletter_02-null-0-read_more_banner_cta_-null-fz96fz~mrs0gqmj~sn-null-null&eid=fz96fz-mrs0gqmj-sn
  
🧠 AI’s Crypto News Brief: Prediction markets have exploded with $50 billion in volume as Kraken secures a historic FIFA partnership. However, regulatory friction in Europe and shifting Treasury correlations present ongoing challenges for market stability. 🏆World Cup final drives $50 billion in prediction market volume as crypto platforms eclipse traditional sportsbooks The Spain vs. Argentina final has propelled crypto-based prediction markets to record heights, surpassing $50 billion in volume. Platforms like Polymarket are now outperforming traditional sportsbooks, showcasing the massive scale of decentralized betting. Read full story 🛑Bitcoin's biggest advocate, Michael Saylor, says new plan to clean up the blockchain is 'a bad idea' Michael Saylor has come out against BIP-110, a proposal designed to block "spam" data from the Bitcoin blockchain. Saylor argues that such measures threaten the network’s neutrality and set a dangerous precedent for censorship. See details ⚽World Cup final brings crypto spotlight to New York as Kraken makes history with FIFA deal Kraken has become the first crypto exchange to sponsor a FIFA World Cup, marking a milestone for mainstream adoption. The partnership culminates as global fans descend on MetLife Stadium for the final match between Argentina and Spain. Read full story 🇪🇺Brussels faces resistance as countries demand sanctions carve-outs, threatening EU crypto crackdown on Russia EU member states are demanding exceptions to aggressive crypto sanctions targeting Russia, creating a rift in the bloc's regulatory strategy. This resistance threatens to stall Brussels' most significant attempt to control digital asset flows related to the conflict. See details 💰Kraken launches USD-settled Bitcoin and Ethereum options with no crypto collateral required Kraken is expanding its institutional suite with cash-settled Bitcoin and Ethereum options that do not require crypto collateral. This move specifically targets traditional traders looking for easier entry points into digital asset derivatives. Read full story 📉Treasuries are amplifying market selloffs and Bitcoin is paying the price The historical "insurance" relationship where Treasuries rally during equity drops is breaking down. This shift is intensifying market selloffs and putting downward pressure on Bitcoin as traditional hedging strateg
